title: DIAT Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 06 Apprentice Posts
description: The Defence Institute of Advanced Technology (DIAT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Library Assistant, Lab Technician, and Assistant Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree or Diploma can apply for the DIAT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
